entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A major food legume and oilseed crop in many Asian countries.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where groundnut is a major crop and aflatoxin contamination is a problem.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A major problem in groundnut-producing countries affecting trade and utilization.

entities.name: AFLATOXINS
entities.description: Highly toxic, cancer-causing substances produced by Aspergillus flavus.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A fungus that produces aflatoxins and infects groundnut pods and seeds.

entities.name: INTEGRATED AFLATOXIN MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Strategies developed to manage and reduce aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL GROUNDNUT WORKSHOP
entities.description: A meeting held at ICRISAT in 1991 that recommended the formation of a Working Group.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The institution where the International Groundnut Workshop was held.

entities.name: WORKING GROUP ON AFLATOXIN MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A group formed to assist and enhance research collaboration and outcomes regarding aflatoxin management.
